metadata.description: Observe desktop and OS state for agentic workflows. Snapshot running processes, track foreground and visible windows, capture screen, read clipboard, diff filesystem changes, and query system information.
metadata.summary: Desktop and OS observation — process snapshots, window tracking, screen capture, clipboard, filesystem diff, system info.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Snapshot Processes
capabilities.description: Take a snapshot of running processes with PID, name, memory usage, and CPU percentage. Optionally filter by name pattern.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring filter on process name.

output.description: ProcessSnapshot with processes array and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Foreground Window
capabilities.description: Get information about the current foreground (active) window including title, PID, and bounds. Windows only.

output.description: WindowInfo with hwnd, title, process_id, and bounds rectangle.

capabilities.name: List Windows
capabilities.description: List all visible top-level windows with title, PID, and bounds. Optionally filter by title pattern. Windows only.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring filter on window title.

output.description: Array of WindowInfo objects with count.

capabilities.name: Screen Capture
capabilities.description: Capture the current screen as PNG. Returns base64-encoded PNG in JSON or saves to a file path. Windows only (GDI BitBlt — may not capture hardware-accelerated content).

parameters.name: monitor
parameters.description: Monitor index (0 = primary). Currently only monitor 0 is supported.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: File path to save PNG. When omitted, PNG is returned as base64 in the JSON response.

output.description: ScreenCaptureResult with dimensions, monitor index, output path or base64 PNG, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Read Clipboard
capabilities.description: Read the current system clipboard contents. Returns text content and whether an image is present.

output.description: ClipboardContents with optional text, image flag, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Filesystem Diff
capabilities.description: Observe a directory for changes over a bounded time window using snapshot diff. Takes before/after snapshots and returns created, modified, and deleted files.

output.description: FsDiffResult with watched path, duration, changes array, and start/end UTC timestamps.

capabilities.name: System Info
capabilities.description: Snapshot system hardware and OS information including OS name/version, hostname, memory, and CPU count.

output.description: SystemSnapshot with OS details, hostname, memory stats, CPU count, and UTC timestamp.

constraints.description: Window observation (observe-window, observe-windows) and screen capture (observe-screen) require Windows. They return an 'unsupported' error on other platforms. Process, clipboard, filesystem, and system commands are cross-platform.
Screen capture uses GDI BitBlt and may not capture hardware-accelerated or DRM-protected content. Only the primary monitor (index 0) is currently supported.

triggers.description: When an agent needs to see running processes.
When an agent needs to know the current foreground window.
When an agent needs to capture the screen.
When an agent needs to read clipboard.
When an agent needs to detect filesystem changes.
When an agent needs hardware/OS information.
